creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
Attached is a new port for the MS FrontPage v5.0 Extentions.
	This port makes it possible for the FP Exts to be used by
	either the apache13-fp or mod_frontpage(1) ports.

	Also included are 13 ports (1 master port, 12 slave ports),
	which provide localized FrontPage Web Administration/Help
	pages for 15 languages.

	Note: 1. Requires update to support Frontpage v5.0 Extentions
